quotes.originalSentence: He conspired behind my back with my enemies. How have you treated people who did the same to you, even when it broke your heart?

quotes.sentence: Forgive him.
quotes.originalSentence: Forgive him.

quotes.sentence: You can forgive all of them. Please, Dany.
quotes.originalSentence: You can. You can forgive all of them, make them see they made a mistake. Make them understand. Please, Dany.

quotes.sentence: We can't hide behind small mercies. The world we need won't be built by men loyal to the world we have.
quotes.originalSentence: We can't hide behind small mercies. The world we need won't be built by men loyal to the world we have.

quotes.sentence: The world we need is a world of mercy, it has to be!
quotes.originalSentence: The world we need is a world of mercy, it has to be!

quotes.sentence: And it will be! It's not easy to see something that's never been before...a good world.
quotes.originalSentence: And it will be! It's not easy to see something that's never been before...a good world.

quotes.sentence: How do you know it will be good?
quotes.originalSentence: How do you know? How do you know it will be good?

quotes.sentence: Because I know what is good. And so do you.
quotes.originalSentence: Because I know what is good. And so do you.

quotes.sentence: I don't!
quotes.originalSentence: I don't!

quotes.sentence: You do! You've always known.
quotes.originalSentence: You do! You do, you've always known.

quotes.sentence: What about everyone else? All the other people who think they know what's good?
quotes.originalSentence: What about everyone else? All the other people who think they know what's good?

quotes.sentence: They don't get to choose. Build the new world with me! We break the wheel...together.
quotes.originalSentence: They don't get to choose. Be with me. Build the new world with me! This is our reason! It has been from the beginning, since you were a little boy with a bastard's name and I was a little girl who couldn't count to twenty. We do it together. We break the wheel...together.

quotes.sentence: You are my Queen. Now and always.
quotes.originalSentence: You are my Queen. Now and always.

quotes.sentence: What unites people? Stories. There's nothing more powerful than a good story. And who has a better story than Bran the Broken?
quotes.originalSentence: What unites people? Armies? Gold? Flags? Stories. There's nothing more powerful than a good story. Nothing can stop it. No enemy can defeat it. And who has a better story than Bran the Broken? The boy who fell from a high tower and lived. He knew he'd never walk again, so he learned to fly. He crossed beyond the Wall, a crippled boy, and became the Three-Eyed Raven. He is our memory, the keeper of all our stories. The wars, weddings, births, massacres, famines. Our triumphs, our defeats, our past. Who better to lead us into the future?

quotes.sentence: Bran has no interest in ruling and he can't father children.
quotes.originalSentence: Bran has no interest in ruling and he can't father children.

quotes.sentence: Good. Rulers will not be born. They will be chosen by the lords and ladies of Westeros to serve the realm.
quotes.originalSentence: Good. Sons of kings can be cruel and stupid, as you well know. His will never torment us.  That is the wheel our queen wanted to break. From now on, rulers will not be born. They will be chosen on this spot by the lords and ladies of Westeros to serve the realm.

quotes.sentence: If we choose you, will you wear the crown? Will you lead the Seven Kingdoms?
quotes.originalSentence: I know you don't want it. I know you don't care about power. But I ask you now. If we choose you, will you wear the crown? Will you lead the Seven Kingdoms to the best of your abilities from this day until your last day?

quotes.sentence: Why do you think I came all this way?
quotes.originalSentence: Why do you think I came all this way?

quotes.sentence: To Brandon of House Stark...I say aye.
quotes.originalSentence: To Brandon of House Stark...I say aye.

quotes.sentence: What's this?
quotes.originalSentence: What's this?

quotes.sentence: A Song of Ice and Fire. Archmaester Ebrose's history. I helped him with the title.
quotes.originalSentence: A Song of Ice and Fire. Archmaester Ebrose's history of the wars following the death of King Robert. I helped him with the title.

quotes.sentence: I suppose I come in for some heavy criticism.
quotes.originalSentence: I suppose I come in for some heavy criticism.

quotes.sentence: Oh, I wouldn't say that.
quotes.originalSentence: Oh, I wouldn't say that.

quotes.sentence: Oh, he's kind to me. He's not kind?
quotes.originalSentence: Oh, he's kind to me. Never would've guessed.  He's not kind?

quotes.sentence: He what? What does he say about me?
quotes.originalSentence: He what? What does he say about me?

quotes.sentence: I don't believe you're mentioned.
quotes.originalSentence: ...I don't believe you're mentioned, ahem.

quotes.sentence: We appear to be missing a Master of Whisperers. And a Master of Laws.
quotes.originalSentence: We appear to be missing a Master of Whisperers. And a Master of Laws. And a Master of War.

quotes.sentence: Yes, Your Grace. Suitable prospects will be brought to you.
quotes.originalSentence: Yes, Your Grace. Suitable prospects will be brought to you for an audience in the coming weeks.

quotes.sentence: And Drogon? Any word?
quotes.originalSentence: And Drogon? Any word?

quotes.sentence: He was last spotted flying east, towards Essos.
quotes.originalSentence: He was last spotted flying east, towards Essos.

quotes.sentence: Perhaps I can find him. Do carry on.
quotes.originalSentence: Perhaps I can find him. Do carry on with the rest.

quotes.sentence: As you wish, Your Grace.
quotes.originalSentence: As you wish, Your Grace.

quotes.sentence: Ser Podrick.

quotes.sentence: We serve at your pleasure, King Bran the Broken. Long may he reign.
quotes.originalSentence: We serve at your pleasure, King Bran the Broken, ruler of the Six Kingdoms and Protector of the Realm. Long may he reign.

quotes.sentence: That will improve.

quotes.sentence: Ser Bronn of the Blackwater, Master of Coin, would you say the crown's debt to you has been paid?
quotes.originalSentence: Ser Bronn of the Blackwater, Lord of Highgarden, Lord Paramount of the Reach and Master of Coin, would you say the crown's debt to you has been paid?

quotes.sentence: Good. Time to start incurring a new one. We have hungry people to feed.
quotes.originalSentence: Good. Time to start incurring a new one. We have hungry people to feed. Can we expect some assistance in this regard?

quotes.sentence: Lord Davos, we have an armada to rebuild and ports to repair.
quotes.originalSentence: Lord Davos, we have an armada to rebuild and ports to repair.

quotes.sentence: We have. These projects will begin as soon as the Master of Coin provides funding.
quotes.originalSentence: We have. These projects will begin as soon as the Master of Coin and Lord of Lofty Titles provides funding.

quotes.sentence: Grandmaester, it is my theory that clean water leads to a healthier population.
quotes.originalSentence: Grandmaester, ahem, it is my theory, based on my years of work on the Casterly Rock sewers, that clean water leads to a healthier population.
